description_long: This is a black baseball cap featuring a colorful, abstract logo patch on the front panel. The cap has a structured, rounded crown with visible stitching and a slightly curved brim extending from the front. The back of the cap includes an adjustable strap in a contrasting bright orange color, allowing for a customizable fit. The logo on the front displays the word 'Artex' surrounded by splashes of pink, blue, yellow, and white, adding a playful and artistic touch. The cap appears to be made primarily of fabric, likely cotton or polyester, with a plastic or metal adjustment mechanism at the back. The overall design is casual and sporty, suitable for urban environments and everyday wear.
description: A black baseball cap with a colorful 'Artex' logo patch on the front and an orange adjustable strap at the back. The cap has a structured crown and a slightly curved brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful 'Artex' logo patch on the black cap and the structured crown with a curved brim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted black fabric and the profile of the curved brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bright orange adjustable strap and the open back section typical of baseball caps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the logo patch and the continuous black fabric of the cap.
